# theGurucool.ai

> AI-powered teacher professional development platform for K-12 educators across Southeast Asia and India.

thegurucool.ai helps teachers build verified AI competency through personalised learning, scenario-based assessment, and a structured framework (TEACH-AI). It is built for classroom practitioners, not administrators.

## Product

- Competency Assessment: 140 scenario-based questions across 7 domains, completed in ~25 minutes
- AI Tutor (GuruCool): Three modes — Guide, Analyst, Examiner — for personalised learning
- Personal Dashboard: Domain scores, earned badges, and next milestone tracking
- School Dashboard: HOD-level assignment, per-teacher analytics, and school-wide metrics

## The TEACH-AI Framework

Seven competency domains grounded in four evidence-based pedagogical foundations (Bloom's Taxonomy, TPACK, UDL, Hattie's Visible Learning):

- T — Technology Integration
- E — Ethics and Responsibility
- A — Assessment Design
- C — Curriculum and Content
- H — Human-AI Collaboration
- A — Adaptive Teaching
- I — Inclusion and Equity

## Audience

- K-12 classroom teachers seeking structured AI professional development
- School leaders and HODs managing teacher growth at scale
- EdTech coordinators and curriculum designers

## Geography

Southeast Asia (Singapore, Philippines, Indonesia, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand) and India.

## Status

Pilot stage, Q2 2026. Waitlist open at https://thegurucool.ai/
